Live trace data reaches Catherby through Falador/Taverley/White Wolf Mountain. Current MrFlame-class stats with food can walk/tank the White Wolf section; prefer running when available, but do not reject the route solely because run is disabled. Record combat/HP-loss evidence after crossings so future run-zone modeling becomes data-driven. Use catherby_bank, catherby_range, catherby_fishing_shore, or catherby_fishing_shop when a task needs that exact utility.

MrFlame deposited successfully from 2815,3440 after passing/opening the south range-house Door 1530 at 2816,3438. Newer live range-door proof uses approach tiles 2817,3439 and 2817,3438. Banking automation should accept inBankArea=true or a successful bank action as arrival proof instead of forcing an exact walk to an older town/bank coordinate. Routing uses 2814,3440 as the pathable bank anchor because cache collision marks 2815,3440 as clipped; 2815,3440 remains accepted by the 1-tile arrival radius and inBankArea/bank action proof.

Usable range object 2728 is at 2817,3444. Passive traces cooked from 2817,3443 and 2819,3443, so this target accepts a 2-tile arrival radius for range usability. Routing uses 2819,3443 as the pathable range anchor because cache collision cannot expand eastward routes from 2817,3443. The nearby Door 1530 at 2816,3438 is the south range-house door and can block movement between deeper range-house tiles and the shore/bank approach area; use the Catherby food runner or object-transition helper rather than repeated raw use_item_on_object loops.

Fishing shop interaction waypoint near Harry. Source data: spawns.json has Harry NPC 576 at 2835,3441, Shops.java maps HARRY to shop id 32, shops.json names shop 32 Harry's Fishing Shop, and the cache context map shows mapfunction 25 object 2758 at 2833,3443. Harry's Fishing Shop stocks small nets, fishing rods, harpoons, lobster pots, bait, and other fishing supplies. Use open_nearest_shop with name 'harry' or 'fishing' from this waypoint. Live proof on 2026-05-25 opened Harry's shop successfully from 2832,3438 and 2831,3438 after ML1 route execution from the Catherby bank area.
Preferred anchor for Catherby fishing loops. The runner reacquires live fishing spots near this shore instead of assuming a fixed NPC index.

Label for the White Wolf Mountain crossing where low-stat MrFlame died near 2869,3436 after White wolf contact. Current MrFlame-class stats with food have walked/tanked this band successfully, taking one 5 HP hit and arriving at Catherby without eating. Prefer running when available, but do not reject current-stats routes solely because run is disabled; avoid only for low combat, no-food, or stalled/idling routes.
